title: × epicattleya guatemalensis
intro: × Epicattleya guatemalensis, also known as the Guatemalan catleya, is a hybrid orchid plant that originated from the cross between Epidendrum and Cattleya species. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of × Epicattleya guatemalensis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
